response.justification: Strong full-stack profile with 13+ years of experience well exceeding the 6+ requirement. Current role at re:cinq directly aligns with the stack (TypeScript/Node.js) and includes AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP) matching a key requirement. Solid background in testing, TDD, microservices, and cloud-adjacent work. Some gaps around Nest.js and React depth, but the breadth and engineering maturity strongly justify an interview.
strengths: 13+ years full-stack experience with TypeScript/Node.js and current AI-agent/MCP work
Strong testing and software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
Polyglot proficiency across Java, TypeScript, DLang, and multiple databases (MongoDB, SQL)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
React experience present but not deeply emphasized relative to backend work
Kotlin not listed; Java experience appears dated (pre-2018)

key_factors.factor: Depth and breadth of senior full-stack experience
Missing explicit Nest.js and current Kotlin experience
